title: coccoloba polystachya var. glabra
intro: Coccoloba polystachya var. glabra, also known as the Caribbean sea grape or glabrous Coccoloba, is a type of flowering plant in the buckwheat family (Polygonaceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Coccoloba polystachya var. glabra include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and support digestive health. The herbal preparation of this plant can be found in various forms, including teas, infusions, and extracts, which are often used to treat various health conditions.
